Boys Track & Field
Tony Emering
Head Coach
🏅 WETF Hall of Fame — Red Line of Honor Inductee
Tony Emering cemented his legacy as the greatest coach in West Essex track and field history. Driven by an unwavering commitment to his athletes and a culture of trust, he guided the program to unprecedented heights and a historic era of excellence.
